content:
🌟 GNews | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Programmatically accessing and retrieving news articles from Google News for various applications and analyses.
✨ Key Features: • Search Google News articles via API • Return results in JSON format • Fetch top news • Search by keywords, major topics, geo-location, and site • Retrieve full article content
📖 Summary: GNews is a lightweight Python package that provides an API to search for articles on Google News. It allows users to fetch top news, news by keywords, major topics, geo-location, or specific sites, and can also retrieve the full article content.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
